description: The SessionInfoSource component can be used to receive an assortment of useful information from an inputted SessionId.

fields.SessionId: The session ID to get information on.
fields.LastUpdated: The last time the info on this component was updated.
fields.Name: The name of the session
fields.Tags: Tags that the session world has.
fields.CorrespondingRecordId: The record ID of the world of the session
fields.CorrespondingOwnerId: The owner UserID of the session's world.
fields.HostUserId: The UserID of the session host.
fields.HostUsername: The username of the session host.
fields.SanitizedHostUsername: The username of the session host which escapes special characters.
fields.AppVersion: The App version of the client of the session being hosted.
fields.HeadlessHost: Whether the session is being hosted by a headless client.
fields.SessionURLs: A list of other session URLs using the same world.
fields.Thumbnail: The link for the session thumbnail in text form.
fields.JoinedUsers: How many users are in the world.
fields.ActiveUsers: Of the people joined, how many are active/focused?
fields.TotalJoinedUsers: How many users have ever joined the world?
fields.MaximumUsers: The maximum users that can be in the session.
fields.MobileFriendly: Whether the session is compatible with a mobile/quest build of the game.
fields.AccessLevel: The sessions level of access to users joining.
fields.IsOnLAN: Whether the session is set to Local Access Network.
fields.AwayKickEnabled: Whether away kick is enabled or not
fields.AwayKickInterval: How long till a user is kicked for being away in a session.

usage: The SessionInfoSource component can give us the name, description, tags, and many other useful pieces of information about a session from an inputted SessionId. The current SessionId can be obtained using the WorldSessionID ProtoFlux node.
